title: Client-Only Laptop Posture Confirmation
objective: Confirm, in a bounded evidence packet, whether the field laptop can now be treated as a client-only access, review, approval, and emergency fallback surface while durable repo, toolchain, validation, secrets, and mutable development state remain on the Olares host.
active_role: Olares Developer Residency Client-Only Posture Confirmation Operator
dependency_note: Packet 007 selected opening this later bounded confirmation packet after Packet 006 publication continuity proof and was published with Packet 008 authority at parent-root commit `7a7c0d6a6ffe3f7f8b8d666c3d96a412c8b1fdb9`. Packet 008 may confirm the client-only posture only; it does not reopen resumed feature delivery.
required_inputs: Published Dev Residency Packet 001 through Packet 006 authority chain
Packet 007 decision selecting a later bounded client-only laptop posture confirmation packet
The milestone-plan acceptance criteria for Milestone 4 client-only laptop posture
Current host mirror and approved private access path evidence
confirmation_scope: Confirm the laptop can attach to Olares through approved private client paths such as private-mesh SSH, VS Code Remote-SSH, the browser-delivered Olares desktop UI, or browser-terminal fallback.
Confirm `/home/olares/code/apex` remains the authoritative host mirror and active implementation path.
Confirm required durable repo, toolchain, validation, secrets, mutable data, and recovery boundaries are not laptop-only.
Record whether the client-only posture is pass, fail, or blocked with exact missing evidence.
explicit_no_go_items: new toolchain materialization or validation retry
success_criteria: Approved laptop-to-Olares client access is evidenced.
The laptop is not the only holder of active repo state, secrets, mutable development state, recovery material, toolchains, or validation context.
Host mirror path authority remains `/home/olares/code/apex` and active implementation remains `/home/olares/code/apex/apex-power-ops-platform`.

If Olares exposes its own browser-delivered desktop UI, that UI may be admitted as a host-supported client surface without changing GitHub-canonical publication or making the laptop the durable runtime anchor.
No public ingress or hosting transition is required for the client-only posture.
Resumed feature delivery remains a later separate decision gate.
sql_permission_note: No database writes are authorized. This packet authorizes only bounded client-only posture confirmation and no product feature delivery, source/test mutation, runtime mutation, service mutation, package mutation, lockfile mutation, remote rewrite, rollback, force, reset, or clean.

confirmation_evidence.browser_desktop_ui_observation: https://desktop.jlswen2121.olares.com delivered a usable Olares desktop shell with working app windows during post-packet review; no VS Code app was evidenced yet, but the host-supported UI surface exists and does not by itself contradict the client-only laptop model
confirmation_evidence.prior_host_validation_basis: Packet 005 passed operations-web typecheck and calc-engine pytest from /home/olares/code/apex
confirmation_evidence.publication_continuity_basis: Packet 006 and the Packet 007 authority publication proved GitHub-canonical publication and clean host-mirror parity

closure_note: Executed 2026-05-05 as a bounded client-only laptop posture confirmation gate. Packet 008 confirms that daily development can continue with the Olares host as the durable development center of gravity while the laptop acts as a portable client, review, approval, and emergency fallback surface. The confirmation is grounded in the published Dev Residency Packet 001 through Packet 007 authority chain, successful private-mesh SSH from the laptop during this packet, clean host-mirror parity at `/home/olares/code/apex`, continued host-local toolchain presence under `/home/olares/apex-data/toolchains`, the prior host validation proof captured in Packet 005, and continued observe-only status for `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`. Packet 008 did not open resumed feature delivery, source/test execution by implication, new toolchain materialization or validation retry, package or lockfile mutation, runtime or service mutation, public ingress widening, AI-services expansion, Gitea or canonical-hosting transition, old-clone mutation or promotion, remote rewrite, rollback, force, reset, or clean.
next_action: Author and execute a later separate resumed feature-delivery readiness gate that consumes Packet 008 results, treats Remote-SSH as the baseline-safe client path, optionally evaluates the browser-delivered Olares desktop UI as a bounded host-supported editor surface, and then selects one bounded Olares-hosted implementation or validation slice before broader product delivery is reopened.
